results.desc: CPEX allow decision: issue receipt with policy context
CPEX deny decision: issue receipt with denial reason
CPEX session taint: allow → taint → deny chain
CPEX redaction: input_hash detects pre/post redact payload difference
CPEX token delegation: receipt records audience-scoped credential
CPEX PII scan deny: receipt records attempted violation
CPEX multi-hop: three enforcement points, one correlation, all verifiable
CPEX cross-principal isolation: same session, different users, separate receipts
CPEX Cedar PDP allow: internal repo access permitted
CPEX Cedar PDP deny: external repo access blocked
CPEX APL gate short-circuit: deny before PDP runs
